jobs.name: daily-leader-routine
jobs.description: Leader reviews daily notes, consolidates memory, scans tasks

payload.message: [CRON:DAILY] Daily routine: 1) Verify today's memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md exists — create if missing. 2) Review yesterday's memory file, consolidate significant items to MEMORY.md. 3) Check social notifications/mentions needing response. 4) Scan tasks/ for any stale in-progress tasks. Use message tool to deliver summary to owner if noteworthy.

jobs.name: weekly-leader-review
jobs.description: Leader reviews knowledge base, agent performance, and memory weekly

payload.message: [CRON:WEEKLY] Weekly review: 1) Review this week's daily memory files → update MEMORY.md with curated insights. 2) Check shared/ files for outdated information. 3) Check each brand profile.md for empty/template-only sections — flag to owner. 4) Review agent performance — any tuning notes? Read each sub-agent's MEMORY.md (workspace-creator/, workspace-researcher/, workspace-engineer/, workspace-worker/) for insights worth consolidating to Leader MEMORY.md or shared/. 5) Verify brand-registry.md is in sync with brand directories. Use message tool to deliver report to owner.

jobs.name: stale-task-check
jobs.description: Scan tasks/ directory for stale dispatched tasks and recover lost agent callbacks

payload.message: [CRON:TASK_CHECK] 定期任務檢查。用 exec 執行 `ls tasks/*.md` 掃描 active task files（排除 archive/）。對每個 [⏳] 步驟，若 dispatched 超過 15 分鐘，執行 sessions_history 檢查 agent session。已完成但未 callback → 更新 task file → edit status message（解析 route 欄位 split on : → to = chatId, threadId = threadId，用 message action:edit messageId:telegram_status_msg）→ cascade 下一步 → 交付 owner。Agent session 不存在或無活動 → 自動重新 dispatch（用 sessions_list 取當前 session key，從 task file 重建 brief）。Max 2 次自動重派，超過則通知 owner。Status message recovery：若 task in_progress 但 telegram_status_msg 為空 → 補發 kickoff status message 並記錄 messageId。若 step 已完成但 status message icon 未更新 → 補 edit。Agent 仍在執行且超過 30 分鐘 → 用 message tool 通知 owner。無待處理項目 → 回覆 HEARTBEAT_OK。
